description: Use trust indicators: shield icons, lock symbols. Blue/green palettes signal safety.
WCAG 2.1 AA minimum. High contrast ratios (4.5:1+). Large touch targets (44px+).
Medical data needs whitespace. Avoid clutter. Use cards for patient info.
Soft blues (#4A90D9), greens (#7BC67E), whites. Avoid aggressive reds for primary UI.
Use humanist sans-serifs (Source Sans, Nunito). 16px+ body text for readability.
Exact numbers, no rounding. Align decimals. Use monospace for financial data.
Two-factor icons, encrypted badges, biometric indicators build trust.
Finance users prefer dark themes for extended use. Reduce eye strain.
Show key metrics upfront. Progressive disclosure for detailed breakdowns.
Green=positive, Red=negative, Yellow=pending. Never use red for non-error states.
Hero images above fold. Minimum 500x500px. White backgrounds for consistency.
Persistent cart icon with item count. One-click add. Slide-out cart panel.
Payment security, shipping guarantees, return policy visible near buy buttons.
Stock levels, limited offers ok. No fake countdowns or artificial scarcity.
Max 3 steps. Auto-fill everything possible. Guest checkout always available.
Don't show everything at once. Guide users through core value in 3-5 steps.
Every empty state should explain value and show a clear next action.
KPI cards top, charts middle, tables bottom. Most important metric is largest.
Group by function, not by feature. Search within settings. Breadcrumb navigation.
3 tiers max. Highlight recommended. Annual/monthly toggle. Feature comparison table.
Progress bars, achievement badges, streaks. Celebrate completions.
Max 70 characters per line. 1.6+ line height. Serif fonts for reading.
Code playgrounds, quizzes, drag-drop exercises. Learning by doing.
Clear chapter/section/subsection structure. Breadcrumbs for navigation.
Toggle to hide navigation, sidebar. Focus on content only.
Full-width food images. Warm color temperature. Natural lighting feel.
Category tabs, item cards, quick-add buttons. Order summary always visible.
Above fold on every page. Map embed. Click-to-call phone number.
Review scores, Instagram feed, TripAdvisor widget near hero section.
Thumb-friendly tap targets. Swipe between categories. Sticky order bar.
Full-screen photo galleries. Virtual tours. Floor plan viewer.
Interactive maps with property pins. Neighborhood data. Commute times.
Price range sliders, bedroom/bathroom counts, amenity checkboxes. Save searches.
Every listing needs a contact form. Agent photo builds trust.
Price trends, comparable sales, school ratings. Data builds buyer confidence.
Bold typography, energetic colors (orange, red, electric blue). Action-oriented CTAs.
Charts for weight, reps, distance. Before/after comparisons. Streak calendars.
Exercise demonstrations need large video players. Slow-motion capability.
Leaderboards, workout sharing, challenge invitations. Community feeds.
Heart rate, steps, calories display. Sync status indicators.
Serif fonts (Georgia, Lora). Professional spacing. Document-like layouts.
Version history, annotation tools, clause highlighting. PDF preview.
Bar association badges, case results, attorney bios with credentials.
Encrypted document badges, NDA status, access control visibility.
Hourly rates, retainer options, payment plans. No hidden costs.
Full-screen project galleries. Case study layouts. Before/after sliders.
Display fonts for headlines. Mixed serif/sans-serif. Variable font weights.
Step-by-step workflow graphics. Timeline animations. Service breakdowns.
Candid team photos, not stock. Individual bios with personality.
Recognizable client logos in grid. Grayscale default, color on hover.
Real-time status updates, map tracking, ETA calculations, delivery timeline.
Sortable columns, inline editing, bulk actions, export functionality.
Clear color system: pending=yellow, in-transit=blue, delivered=green, problem=red.
Map-based route display, waypoint markers, traffic overlay, distance metrics.
Large buttons, voice commands, one-hand operation, offline capability.
